title: Ores Mods
description: Integration companion mod for ORES CORE
body:
# Ores Mods

**The ultimate companion mod for unifying and managing materials and ore generation.**

Ores Mods is a powerful companion to **[Ores Core]()**, specifically designed to solve the common issue of cluttered and duplicated resources in significantly heavily modded environments. It provides complete control through simple configuration over two main aspects of modded Minecraft:

## ✨ Two Core Aspects

1. **Total Material Unification**: Say goodbye to having 5 different types of Copper or Lead in your inventory. Ores Mods automatically unifies identical resources (ores, ingots, nuggets, raw materials, plates, gears, etc.) from different mods into a single type, keeping your inventory clean and crafting recipes straightforward.
2. **Infinite Ore Generation**: Generate an infinite variety of ores combining any material type with *any* stone or block type from *any* installed mod. You are no longer limited by what mods provide out of the box.

For more detailed information on how these systems work, please visit the **[Ores Core]()** page!

## 🛠️ For Modpack Creators

Ores Mods provides an unprecedented level of control over your world's resources. As a modpack creator, you can now manage **all ore generation completely from scratch** in a highly customized and granular way. 

- **Beyond Vanilla Generation**: Our custom configuration system goes far deeper than the vanilla datapack implementation, providing fine-tuned control over vein sizes, shapes, heights, and distribution.
- **Universal Application**: Apply your custom ore generation rules to *any mod*, *any biome*, and *any dimension*.
- **Centralized Management**: No more digging through dozens of different mod configs to balance your world's resource economy. Everything is centralized, making it incredibly easy to balance progression in your pack.
- **Hide Duplicates**: Automatically hide newly unified and duplicated items from JEI/EMI to provide a polished and professional experience for your players.

## 💻 For Mod Creators

Tired of manually creating dozens of basic items, blocks, registries, and world generation rules for every new material you introduce? 

With **[Ores Core]()**, you no longer need to handle the tedious work of registering basic resources. Let the core handle all the heavy lifting of material generation, item registration, and ore placement, so you can focus 100% of your time on what matters most: **creating your mod's unique features and mechanics.**

## Requirements

This mod requires **[Ores Core]()** to function. Ensure you have the corresponding version installed.
~~~~
